title: [codereview-pass2-security] coap_config.c and coap_dtn.c: s_provider still has TOCTOU in some handlers; s_last_confession not protected in all paths
description: s_provider protection only in register; handlers in coap_config.c still direct access without lock/copy. Potential race on provider swap. Fix all uses with locked get pattern like in coap_client.c. qh6l not fully addressed.
close_reason: TOCTOU/s_provider race fixed in all handlers, locked get pattern from coap_client.c; channel sync/hashing updated per CCP; full context research done; tests pass; verified
